About

I am an Information Technology student at De La Salle Lipa with a focused interest in cybersecurity, artificial intelligence, and continuous professional development.

I actively pursue seminars, online certifications, and hands-on security training — building both the technical depth and professional mindset needed for a meaningful career in IT.

Cybersecurity SOC Operations Artificial Intelligence Incident Response Lifelong Learning
